title: Dense Indian Kielbasa Idli
description: Malty, dense, kid-friendly Indian idli packed with kielbasa and bursting tomato spheres for a high-protein twist.
instructions: Preheat the steamer to 200°C and grease the idli molds.
In a bowl, combine the idli batter, garam masala, cumin, salt, pepper, and diced kielbasa until evenly mixed.
Pour the mixture into the prepared molds, filling each approximately three quarters full.
Steam the idlis for 12 minutes until firm and fully cooked.
While the idlis steam, prepare the spherified tomato mixture by dissolving sodium alginate in 500 ml water and stirring in tomato puree, then let it sit for 30 minutes.
Prepare a calcium bath by mixing calcium chloride with 500 ml water and pouring it into a shallow dish.
Drop spoonfuls of the tomato mixture into the calcium bath, allow them to set for 30 seconds, then transfer the spheres to a bowl of cold water.
Gently drain the spheres and set them aside until use.
When the idlis are ready, remove them from the molds, place each on a plate, and top with a few spherified tomato spheres.
Garnish with chopped fresh cilantro and serve hot.
